SELECT input, toInt8OrZero(input) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT input, toInt8OrZero(input) AS converted_value FROM (SELECT input FROM test_table WHERE input LIKE '%-%') AS negative_numbers;
SELECT input, toInt8OrZero(input) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrZero(input) > 0;
SELECT A.input, toInt8OrZero(A.input) AS converted_value FROM test_table AS A JOIN (SELECT input FROM test_table WHERE input LIKE '1%') AS B ON A.input = B.input;
SELECT toInt8OrZero(coalesce(NULLIF(input, 'abc'), '10')) AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT DISTINCT toInt8OrZero(CAST(input AS String)) FROM (SELECT input FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrZero(input) BETWEEN -128 AND 127);
SELECT SUM(toInt8OrZero(input)) FROM (SELECT input FROM test_table WHERE input NOT LIKE 'abc') GROUP BY input;
SELECT toInt8OrZero('-129') AS below_lower_bound, toInt8OrZero('130') AS above_upper_bound;
